name: My boss fired me after forklift accident at work is that legal in Boise?
description: Illegal retaliation; file complaint with state labor commission ASAP and document everything.[2]

mainEntity.name: My boss fired me after forklift accident at work is that legal in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; file complaint with state labor commission ASAP and document everything.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, retaliation for filing a workers' compensation claim is illegal in Idaho and Utah.** Employers cannot terminate you for reporting injuries or pursuing benefits.[2] Key factors: Document all communications, note timing of termination post-accident, and prove the firing links to your claim. File a retaliation complaint with the Idaho Industrial Commission or Utah Labor Commission within deadlines, typically 180 days.[3] Preserve evidence like emails and witness statements; seek legal help immediately to protect your rights and pursue wrongful termination alongside comp benefits.[2]
